abstract.text: Variant objects box various Godot Objects, you create them with one of the
constructors, and you can retrieve the contents using the various extension
constructors that are declared on the various types that are wrapped.

Returns the exponential of this quaternion. The rotation axis of the result is the normalized rotation axis of this quaternion, the angle of the result is the length of the vector part of this quaternion.
Returns the negative value of the Quaternion. This is the same as writing Quaternion(-q.x, -q.y, -q.z, -q.w). This operation results in a quaternion that represents the same rotation.
W component of the quaternion. This is the “real” part.
